relationships: kab:Ur tewɛiṛ ara akken ad tt-yexdem yiwen
kab:Ur yewɛiṛ ara ad yexdem yiwen aya
kab:Ur yewɛiṛ ara akken ad t-yexdem yiwen
kab:Ur yuklal ara ad s-tt-iẓer yiwen deg kra
kab:Tom ed mary la tturaren yiwen n wurar
kab:Bɣiɣ ad yili kra n yiwen i wumi ara meslayeɣ
kab:Dacu i yellan deg-s ma yella kra n yiwen i t-yeẓṛan﹖
kab:Yezmer yiwen seg-wen ad d-yeldi tawwurt, ma ulac aɣilif﹖
kab:Tom ur yessin ula d yiwen seg yimeddukal n Mary
kab:Aṭas n wayen ara iẓer yiwen i yellan deg Paris
kab:Ur tezmireḍ ara ad txedmeḍ d yiwen ma ulac lemqadra gar-awen
kab:Ur zmireɣ ara ad t-xedmeɣ mebla ma iɛawen-iyi kra n yiwen
kab:Yal yiwen yessaram d akken kra n dir ur d-iḍerru
kab:Ula yiwen seg yimawlan-iw ur yezmir ad ihder Tafransist
kab:Ula d yiwen seg yinelmaden-nni ur d-yewwiḍ deg lawan
